holdings.infoBox: VUS is an equity ETF with a total of 99 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 6.25%, NVIDIA at 5.33%, Broadcom at 3.44%, Microsoft at 3.13%, and Micron Technology at 2.62%.

overview.description: The Virtus US Dividend ETF (VUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is actively managed and focuses on dividend-paying US companies. The fund seeks equity income by investing in stocks listed on US exchanges that demonstrate consistent dividend profiles. VUS was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.
